message:
refactor(robot): restructure PrintRecipes with detailed agent breakdown

Enhances the --robot-recipes output with more detailed recipe information
including per-agent specifications and source tracking.

New Types:
- RecipeInfo: Extended recipe metadata with source and agent breakdown
- RecipeAgentInfo: Individual agent specification (type, count, model)

Enhanced Output:
- total_agents: Sum of all agent counts
- source: Where recipe came from (builtin, user, project)
- agents: Array of {type, count, model} for each agent type

Example Output:
{
  "recipes": [{
    "name": "full-stack",
    "description": "Full stack development",
    "source": "builtin",
    "total_agents": 6,
    "agents": [
      {"type": "cc", "count": 3, "model": "sonnet"},
      {"type": "cod", "count": 2, "model": ""},
      {"type": "gmi", "count": 1, "model": ""}
    ]
  }]
}

This enables AI agents to make better recipe selection decisions
based on agent composition rather than just name/description.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
